_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: The following reporting periods apply as reference periods to vehicle sub-groups: 2019 for sub-groups 4-UD, 4-RD, 4-LH, 5-RD, 5-LH, 9-RD, 9-LH, 10-RD, 10-LH; 2021 for sub-groups 1, 2, 3, 11, 12, 16; and 2025 for all others (including coaches, trailers, and medium lorries).
